question: Chapters
feedback: The text does not list any chapters or sections of the thesis. You need to explicitly name the main parts of your work (e.g., Introduction, Literature Review, Methodology, Implementation, Results, Conclusion).

question: Description
feedback: The text contains no description of the contents of the thesis. You should provide a brief summary of what each chapter covers to guide the reader through your research process.

question: Structure
feedback: The text provides no information regarding the structure of the thesis. To improve this, create a roadmap paragraph that outlines the logical flow of your work, from the problem definition to the final results.
